---
title: EMPIAR
alias: &ALIAS empiar
href: https://www.ebi.ac.uk/empiar/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

EMPIAR (Electron Microscopy Public Image Archive, EMBL-EBI) is a public resource for raw two-dimensional electron microscopy images, enabling reproducibility and reuse of cryo-EM and cryo-ET data.

## Key Features

- Archives raw cryo-EM micrographs, particle stacks, tilt series, and tomograms
- Linked to corresponding EMDB density maps and PDB structures from the same study
- Provides metadata on microscope, detector, data collection parameters, and sample
- Supports large-scale data downloads for computational reprocessing and benchmarking
- Enables reproducibility checks and method development using real experimental raw data

## Use Cases in Research

- Downloading raw cryo-EM data of bacterial ribosomes or resistance proteins for reprocessing
- Benchmarking deep learning-based particle picking and 2D/3D classification algorithms
- Training AI models for automated cryo-EM data processing with diverse real-world datasets
- Reproducing published structures of antibiotic-target complexes from raw micrograph data
- Developing cryo-ET analysis workflows using deposited tilt series from pathogen samples

## Getting Started

Visit [EMPIAR](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/empiar/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
